sentences.arabic: نَجَحَتِ الطَّالِبَةُ لَيْلَى فِي امْتِحَانِ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenica Lejla je položila ispit iz arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: The student Layla passed her Arabic language exam.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَتْ عَلَى أَعْلَى دَرَجَةٍ فِي صَفِّهَا.
sentences.translation: Dobila je najvišu ocjenu u svom razredu.
sentences.translationEn: She got the highest grade in her class.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik je čestitao Lejli pred njenim drugarima.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher congratulated Layla in front of her classmates.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لَيْلَى إِنَّهَا دَرَسَتْ كَثِيرًا لِهَذَا الامْتِحَانِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je rekla da je puno učila za ovaj ispit.
sentences.translationEn: Layla said that she studied a lot for this exam.
